name: Chocolate Peanut Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients in a 1-1/2 quart saucepan.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture reaches a full boil.
3. Lower heat and keep stirring while the mixture boils slowly for 3-5 minutes.
4. Turn off heat.
5. Stir in all at once, 1 cup of peanuts.
6. Beat until candy starts to thicken.
7. Drop from teaspoon onto waxed paper.
